results.title: Wisconsin men's basketball 'keeping our eye to the ground' amid guard's eligibility lawsuit
results.description: Badgers general manager Marc VandeWettering said the program is tracking everything going on nationally, but said he could not comment on the former player.

results.title: Reach H1 Earnings Call Highlights
results.description: Reach (LON:RCH) said first-half revenue fell as lower referral traffic, particularly from Google, continued to weigh on digital audiences, but the publisher maintained that it remains on track to deliver full-year profit in line with market expectations. Chief Executive Piers North told investors that the period was marked by “significant external change,” including a 40% [...]

results.title: Bay Area sisters take spotlight at Sonoma drag races
results.description: Sisters Jasmine Salinas and Jianna Evaristo were living a childhood dream over the weekend.
